note: Address-based payment/change split fixes the inverted PAYMENT/CHANGE labelling on TXs where the external payment is smaller than the change (e.g. 0.01 SOST sent out of a 6 SOST UTXO leaves 5.98 SOST in change). The old heuristic 'smaller amount = change' got it backwards; the explorer now identifies CHANGE as 'output goes back to the first input's pkh' and PAYMENT as 'everything else'. Latest Transactions table now shows the external payment amount (not total_output) for transfers, with a hover tooltip breaking it down: Payment / Change / Total out. Backend RPCs gettransaction, getrawtransaction (mempool path) and listtransfers all gained source_address, payment_amount and change_amount fields when the first input can be resolved. NOTE: the previous v163 release still requires a node rebuild for the full effect — 'TX NOT FOUND' for very old TXs still pending separately. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
